microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery **validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable execution across distributed engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous quality-validation model.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring end-to-end workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — a direct analogue to agentic AI-assisted productivity at scale.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, translating complex technical signals into executive-ready narratives.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-assisted code generation workflows, running demos and training across 14 Azure service teams that saved 37 engineering hours monthly and established repeatable utilization benchmarks.

Surfaced critical **feature gaps** through 11+ structured user interviews with Azure engineering teams, directly influencing roadmap prioritization to include intent-based YAML generation — a process mirroring KPI definition and diagnostic analytics.

Improved **data quality and retrieval** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and establishing a cleaner semantic layer for engineering consumers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — translating operational data into prescriptive decisions at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and publish certified KPIs used in exec-facing planning reviews.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — directly paralleling data-driven quality diagnostics and process optimization for product teams.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the transition strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, applying data-backed risk scoring to sequence rollout safely.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and establishing guardrails that reduced regression risk across releases.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and improving engineering throughput through structured sprint cadences and anomaly-driven triage.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, applying descriptive analytics to identify conversion bottlenecks and drive booking efficiency.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a data-informed digital-go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and ad targeting using performance metrics and cohort-level analysis.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering prescriptive pricing recommendations to leadership that improved model accuracy and supported data-driven financial decision-making.
